name: redgifs-downloader
description: Firefox + Chrome extension that adds HD/SD download buttons on RedGifs videos.

scripts.lint:firefox: web-ext lint --source-dir=. --self-hosted --ignore-files=dist node_modules package.json package-lock.json recon.js manifest-chrome.json updates.json PUBLISHING.md scripts
scripts.build:firefox: web-ext build --source-dir=. --artifacts-dir=dist/firefox --overwrite-dest --filename=redgifs-downloader-firefox-{version}.zip --ignore-files=dist node_modules package.json package-lock.json recon.js manifest-chrome.json updates.json PUBLISHING.md scripts
scripts.sign:firefox: web-ext sign --source-dir=. --artifacts-dir=dist/firefox --channel=unlisted --ignore-files=dist node_modules package.json package-lock.json recon.js manifest-chrome.json updates.json PUBLISHING.md scripts
scripts.run:firefox: web-ext run --source-dir=. --ignore-files=dist node_modules package.json package-lock.json recon.js manifest-chrome.json updates.json PUBLISHING.md scripts
